## Summary

Describe the problem, the chosen solution, and the user-visible outcome.

## Scope and non-goals

List the behavior included in this pull request and anything intentionally deferred.

## Compatibility and risk

Describe protocol, schema, CLI, platform, security, privacy, or operational implications.
Write `None` only when none apply.

## Validation

- [ ] Targeted tests for each logical commit
- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Installed workflow exercised when public CLI or packaging changes
- [ ] Failure paths and exit codes covered when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible or compatibility-sensitive behavior
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated when applicable

## Review readiness

- [ ] Commit history is logical and free of WIP/fixup noise
- [ ] Complete diff reviewed
- [ ] No unrelated, generated, private, or temporary files
- [ ] Follow-up work is linked and remains explicitly out of scope
